name: Crab and Spaghetti Bake

ingredients.item: can low fat cream of mushroom soup
Salt and cayenne pepper to taste

method: Cook pasta according to package directions; drain.
In a large skillet, sauté onion in butter or margarine until soft. Blend in soup, half-and-half, Worcestershire sauce
and mustard. Add spaghetti, crab, eggs, water chestnuts, and pimentos; toss gently. Season to taste with salt and red
Spoon spaghetti mixture into a shallow 2-quart casserole dish or 9-inch square baking dish, lightly sprayed with
non-stick cooking spray. Sprinkle with cheese.
Bake uncovered at 375 degrees for about 25 minutes or until bubbly and heated through.
(13) Avocado, Roasted Mushroom, and Ham Spaghetti
Mushrooms, avocado, and ham are perfect for this winter-inspired pasta dish. You combine crunchy mushrooms
with creamy avocados to create a hearty sauce that will keep you warm as the weather gets colder.
